productDisplayName: Tantra Women's Red Flower Heart Yellow T-shirt
description: Composition:Yellow round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Step aside from slogan tees and make a petite, feminine statement with this mild graffiti.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7", Chest-32", Waist-26"
